title: Vitamin A (retinol)
body_html:
Vitamin A is a fat soluble vitamin.

Functions
  • converted into retinal, an important visual pigment
  • important in epithelial cell differentiation
  • antioxidant

Consequences of vitamin A deficiency
  • night blindness
